ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signs" (
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sign type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the sign */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the sign */,
  "diagram_url" TEXT /* URL to the diagram of the sign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sign */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used for the sign */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the sign */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sign is customizable */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity a customer can order for this sign type */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity a customer can order for this sign type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "z_bars" (
  "z_bar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Z-bar type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the Z-bar */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of Z-bars per sign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Z-bar */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used for the Z-bar */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the Z-bar */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the Z-bar is customizable */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity a customer can order for this Z-bar type */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity a customer can order for this Z-bar type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("z_bar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sign_z_bar_relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sign */,
  "z_bar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Z-bar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sign_z_bar_relationship_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES signs ("sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sign_z_bar_relationship_z_bar_id FOREIGN KEY ("z_bar_id") REFERENCES z_bars ("z_bar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole configuration */,
  "hole_size" TEXT /* Size of the holes */,
  "horizontal_spacing" TEXT /* Spacing between holes horizontally */,
  "vertical_spacing" TEXT /* Spacing between holes vertically */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hole configuration */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used for the holes */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the holes */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hole configuration is customizable */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity a customer can order for this hole configuration */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity a customer can order for this hole configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sign_hole_relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sign */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hole configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sign_hole_relationship_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sign_hole_relationship_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES signs ("sign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of hardware */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware */,
  "quantity_per_z_bar" INTEGER /* Quantity of hardware per Z-bar */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used for the hardware */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the hardware */,
  "customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the hardware is customizable */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity a customer can order for this hardware type */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity a customer can order for this hardware type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "z_bar_hardware_relationship" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "z_bar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Z-bar */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_z_bar_hardware_relationship_z_bar_id FOREIGN KEY ("z_bar_id") REFERENCES z_bars ("z_bar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_z_bar_hardware_relationship_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardware ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the customer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the customer's company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer's company operates in */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the customer's company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sign ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of signs ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in production, shipped) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES signs ("sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "sign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sign */,
  "z_bar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Z-bar */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "customization_options" TEXT /* Customization options selected by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardware ("hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_z_bar_id FOREIGN KEY ("z_bar_id") REFERENCES z_bars ("z_bar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_sign_id FOREIGN KEY ("sign_id") REFERENCES signs ("sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due for the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the invoice is due */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order was shipped */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was received */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was received */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production process */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being produced */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the production process */,
  "quality_control_passed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the production passed quality control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the production record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the production record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Name of the carrier used for shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., shipped, delivered, in transit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shipment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the shipment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
